case_title: AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK VS. MANUEL C RODRIGUEZ ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK SUCCESSOR BY MERGER TO AMERICAN EXPRESS BANK, FSB RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, MANUEL C AN INDIVIDUAL $4,300.41 PRINCIPAL, $290.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,590.41, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 200020548)

DECLARATION RE: COPIES OF DOCUMENTS IN LIEU OF ORIGINALS; DECLARATION RE: ACCOUNT FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT AND BRIEF SUMMARY OF CASE PURSUANT (TRANSACTION ID # 200020548) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK SUCCESSOR BY MERGER TO AMERICAN EXPRESS BANK, FSB

REQUEST FOR CLERK'S JUDGMENT BY DEFAULT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $290.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 200020548) AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, MANUEL C AN INDIVIDUAL
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE IN REGARDS TO ALL COUNTS; COUNT 2: QUANTUM MERUIT (TRANSACTION ID # 200020548) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 THROUGH 20, INCLUSIVE
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF FEB-23-2021 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY, (TRANSACTION ID # 100183180): SLINSKY, LOURDES SUBSTITUTED FOR PENUELA, SPENCER AS ATTORNEY FOR AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK SUCCESSOR BY MERGER TO AMERICAN EXPRESS BANK, FSB
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS (TRANSACTION ID # 200005551) AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, MANUEL C AN INDIVIDUAL
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-24-2020 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-24-2020 CONTINUED TO FEB-23-2021 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
